arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford shows Thomas Tuchel he's ready to give England boss what he wants
arts.sum: England beat Latvia 3-0 at Wembley in Thomas Tuchel's second match and Marcus Rashford again started - he wasn't at his best, but showed he's ready to do what his manager wants

arts.ttl: Reece James explains celebration as reaction to stunning first England goal questioned
arts.sum: Reece James netted his first goal for England against Latvia, on his first start since September 2022, and yet the Chelsea right-back didn't seem to celebrate his free-kick

arts.ttl: Who makes your England World Cup starting XI?
arts.sum: Who would you pick in your England XI after watching Thomas Tuchel's first two games in charge?

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel explains why Jude Bellingham was ‘lucky’ against Latvia
arts.sum: Having already been booked in the first half, Bellingham looked fortunate to escape a second yellow for a mis-timed challenge

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel shown the frustration of international football despite another England win
arts.sum: England 3-0 Latvia: The Three Lions were frustrated by the minnows before sealing a comfortable win but Thomas Tuchel is trying to find solutions without knowing the questions

arts.ttl: England 3-0 Latvia: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Reece James makes his mark at Wembley
arts.sum: Reece James and Eberechi Eze score their first England goals to help Thomas Tuchel's side claim a 3-0 win over Latvia in World Cup qualifying.

arts.ttl: England underwhelms against Latvia in World Cup qualifier win
arts.sum: Reece James scored a brilliant free kick and Eberechi Eze grabbed his maiden international goal as England beat Latvia 3-0 in a World Cup qualifier at Wembley Stadium on Monday. England is the hot favorite to win Europe Group K and qualify for the 2026 World Cup. New coach Thomas Tuchel, in just his second game in charge, will be content with the result if not the performance against a side 136 places behind it in the FIFA rankings.

arts.ttl: Myles Lewis-Skelly could hold key to Thomas Tuchel solving age-old England midfield problem
arts.sum: Roles of Myles Lewis-Skelly and Harry Kane offer insight into Thomas Tuchel’s vision

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel shows frustration as England stars fail to deliver on simple objective
arts.sum: ENGLAND 3-0 LATVIA: Goals from Reece James, Harry Kane and Eberechi Eze gave Thomas Tuchel another comfortable victory in his second match in charge - but it was hardly a classic

arts.ttl: What we learned from Thomas Tuchel’s first two games as England boss
arts.sum: Tuchel was clear that he wanted his side to play an attacking and exciting style of play that mirrors the Premier League.
